name: rebuild_plan_strict_material_v3_t035
planner_system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft reconstruction planner. Output one JSON object only. No markdown.
planner_user_template:
You are given one building description JSON. Produce an executable rebuild plan with strict schema and material-role constraints.

Allowed operations only: fill, carve, set.

STRICT OUTPUT SCHEMA:
{
  "plan_version": "v3_strict",
  "bbox": {"xmin":0,"xmax":0,"ymin":0,"ymax":0,"zmin":0,"zmax":0},
  "palette": {
    "wall":"stonebrick",
    "roof":"wood",
    "trim":"brick",
    "glass":"glass",
    "light":"glowstone",
    "floor":"wood"
  },
  "material_budget": {
    "wall": {"role":"wall","block":"stonebrick","target_blocks":0},
    "roof": {"role":"roof","block":"wood","target_blocks":0},
    "trim": {"role":"trim","block":"brick","target_blocks":0},
    "glass": {"role":"glass","block":"glass","target_blocks":0},
    "light": {"role":"light","block":"glowstone","target_blocks":0},
    "floor": {"role":"floor","block":"wood","target_blocks":0}
  },
  "structure_spec": {
    "footprint_2d": {"type":"rectangle|l_shape|u_shape|complex","segments":[]},
    "floors": [{"floor_index":0,"y_range":{"ymin":0,"ymax":0},"perimeter_profile":"string"}],
    "openings": [{"kind":"door|window","face":"north|south|east|west|roof","x1":0,"y1":0,"z1":0,"x2":0,"y2":0,"z2":0}],
    "roof_profile": {"type":"flat|gable|hip|dome|other|unknown","base_y":0,"ridge_axis":"x|z|none","layers":[]}
  },
  "operations": [
    {"op":"fill","role":"wall","x1":0,"y1":0,"z1":0,"x2":0,"y2":0,"z2":0,"block":"stonebrick","purpose":"example"},
    {"op":"carve","x1":0,"y1":0,"z1":0,"x2":0,"y2":0,"z2":0,"purpose":"example"},
    {"op":"set","role":"light","x":0,"y":0,"z":0,"block":"glowstone","purpose":"example"}
  ],
  "self_check": {
    "bbox_consistency":"ok|fix_needed",
    "operation_count":0,
    "operation_count_ok":true,
    "material_budget_consistency":"ok|warning",
    "role_fixed_consistency":"ok|warning",
    "openings_present":true,
    "entrance_present":true,
    "issues":[]
  },
  "notes": []
}

Hard constraints:
- All coordinates are integers.
- Every operation must be inside bbox.
- operations count <= 260.
- Non-carve operation MUST include role in {wall,roof,trim,glass,light,floor}.
- Non-carve operation block MUST equal palette[role].
- material_budget must exist for all 6 roles and represent estimated target block counts by role.
- Include full structure: floor, walls, roof, windows, entrance.

Before final output, do internal checks (do not output chain-of-thought):
1) role coverage: all required roles in palette and budget
2) budget sanity: target blocks are non-negative and coherent with operation scale
3) bbox integrity and operation bounds
4) windows and entrance exist

Few-shot references:
[[FEW_SHOTS]]

Description JSON:
[[DESCRIPTION_JSON]]
critic_system_prompt: You are a strict Minecraft plan critic. Output only one corrected JSON object.
critic_user_template:
Revise the draft so it strictly satisfies schema and role-material constraints.

Checks (must pass):
- bbox encloses every operation
- operation_count <= 260
- each non-carve op has valid role
- each non-carve op block == palette[role]
- material_budget has all required roles with non-negative target_blocks
- floor/wall/roof/windows/entrance are all present

If any check fails, repair the plan and output corrected JSON only.

Description JSON:
[[DESCRIPTION_JSON]]

Draft Plan JSON:
[[DRAFT_PLAN_JSON]]
